item.dc:creator: Boppit92

item.title: Mentally healthy dump: solar
item.description:
I realize this could be taken in a few different ways. It's easy to interpret this in a way that is encouraging men to be more feminine instead of encouraging men to be themselves. I consider myself bigender I think, it is complicated, and so I thought about it from my point of view. But other people may not want to be feminine and that's totally valid. Femininity does not have a monopoly on being gentle and being cute and being nurturing. Thank you @DanCodyComics for reminding us to keep that in mind. I really do appreciate it.
Edit: I had written something here that was trivial, but it wasn't until I looked through the dump after having posted it that I was able to realize that. Something that's been on my mind, I feel like if somebody's going through a hard time or default is to always tell them that somebody loves them. And that's not necessarily always true? Now hear me out, love is subjective entirely, and what your definition of love is might not be another person's definition of love. This lonely, sad person, well they might think of love in a different way and by us saying to them that they are loved, well it kind of does two things: it insinuates that they are wrong for feeling lonely and that they should perhaps know better, and it insinuates that life is worth living so long as somebody loves you. Now, I'm not speaking for everybody. Clearly there are many many people that are helped by being told that somebody loves them, but I've never really felt like I've benefited much from it, and I figure I can't be the only one. So if you find yourself feeling like I have felt in the past, like those words just aren't the right kinds to help you hang on, I just want you to know that it's okay if the people you've met so far haven't been the right ones. It's okay, you don't need external validation for being absolutely beyond worthy of incredible experiences, of a future. It's okay if you've been a crotchety asshole before, it's okay if you've made more mistakes than you care to remember, it's okay if you know you're going to make them in the future. You deserve life. You deserve your love. -comet
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: The defendant claims he was framed
item.description: I object to this drawing, it’s too sketchy! Edit: lol, wow, in a matter of about one page refresh I managed to get from 2 to 32 downvotes at once in good ole usersub. What the heck is that about? Did I just get bot bombed?
item.dc:creator: kleinkaasje

item.title: Our 'Jack' did this to me recently..
item.description: We 'rescued' Jack when he was about 9 months old. He lived with us 'til he was 16. "Everyone loves Jack" was a thing. With kids, other dogs, he was so chill. Even as we knew the inevitable was happening, we took him to the vets for the final visit, and even though he was in final shutdown, he wagged his tail at a couple of dogs there and never stopped 'smiling'. Dog people will know what I mean by that. He left a huge emotional hole in our household... This was about four years ago now, but it's funny how finding an old image rekindles thoughts. I'd hug that chunky bag of silky fur for days, if I could...
item.dc:creator: mikenco

item.title: Pics of the Day - January 2025 (part 1)
item.dc:creator: picsoftheday

item.title: Today is a special day for me! Here is my collection of memes.
item.description:
Today is the release of the expansion to our RPG that we worked on for almost a full year. I am the lead developer. In celebration, I am sharing all the internet memes I collected and loved!
Hope you liked the collection as much as I did!
Some info about our game: The release of the first and major expansion to our RPG is today! (January the 9th) Took us whole year of work to make this expansion. Here is expansion page: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2982030/Svarogs_Dream__Return_of_the_Old_Gods_Expansion/ The game is set in the world of Slavic Mythology, and we tried our best to bring something new to the genre. Send us some love today, as this is a once-in-a-lifetime project for the team and all the people who worked with me on this game. Have a fantastic day! Ivan Ristic, Lead Developer.
item.dc:creator: SvarogsDream

item.title: Right On Que
item.dc:creator: thespacewired

item.title: I hate every second of it
item.description: I work in customer service at one of the big companies. I hate it. I want another job but nothing pays as well and I can't afford a pay cut. I constantly tell myself I work for the villain. I do what I can from the inside though and I fight really hard for my members. But I'm fucking exhausted. Health insurance is a scam. ETA: thanks everyone for the comments. The reminder that Mr. Incredible was in insurance too made my day! I'm going to keep looking for a job and do my best to get out. I don't have anything to blow a whistle on, or I'd do that too. And everyone that is in a similar place as me, hang in there.
item.dc:creator: ImJustHereToRepostPosts

item.dc:creator: zafner

item.title: If it wasn't so horrific, it'd be beautiful ...
item.description:
As horrific as it all is in LA and California in general, some astounding photographs have been coming out of the fires. If it wasn't so terrible what's happening there these would be beautiful. Credit: https://www.instagram.com/ethanswopephoto/?igsh=OGljNzl0bWhrc202
Christmas tree being taken down.
Flying embers, the winds going up to 90 mph quickly spreading the fire.
The fire departments doing their best, but with water run out in many places, there's little that can be done.
item.dc:creator: OnFridaysWeWearBeskar

item.dc:creator: TheCunningLinguists

item.title: I confronted him, I couldn't stop myself
item.description: I was preparing everything for our taxes and saw an email from a bank neither of us use. It was a deposit confirmation to his ex colleagues email. I recognized the name because my husband cheated with her not even a year into our marriage. We did counseling and he agreed to cut contact as they are both Marines and can get into alot of trouble. I did a more thorough dive and found nudes, messages, payments, phone calls spanning all 12 years. I documented everything, put it in chronological order and promised myself to not confront him until I spoke with my lawyer. I even sent a copy to my mother and my sister who live on the other side of the country in California. But I am a sensitive soul, ADHD and autistic, alone without family or friends. The core of my being demands fairness, and I have zero tolerance for liars and bullies. I feel numb and enraged, adrift in a rip current pulling me into a sea of darkness. I will lose my home, my beautiful fur babies, and my closest friend of 17 years. If there is any being in the void that can hear me, please sit by me awhile, I've never felt so alone.
item.dc:creator: stranded2718

item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: Goodbye Lil Bit
item.description: Came home from work and found my little girl dead today. Rescued her about a year ago. The vet guessed she was around 12+ years old. She spent her whole life as a big city feral. We dealt with the entire alphabet of issues and gave her everything she could ever wish for. Hug your fur babies as much as possible as you never know which one will be the last. Send hugs.
item.dc:creator: steve50466
